productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Snova Sequence 4 Blue Sports Shoes
description: Streamlined for a more powerful, more comfortable stride, these adidas Supernova&trade Sequence 4 shoes step you into an anatomical GEOFIT&trade construction and a breathable air mesh upper. These running shoes also protect your joints with impact-absorbent adiPRENE® cushioning and TORSION® midfoot support and their perfect for overpronators. Upper Mesh uppers with reflective synthetic overlays for excellent ventilation and high-visibility when running in low light conditions Anatomical Geofit construction for greater comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performance Lace-ups for snug Fit Mesh tongue for greater breathability Cushioned collar for greater comfort Brand name embossed on the tongue and on the heel Midsole OrthoLite® performance insoles giving 'comfort from the inside out' that can be replaced with a medical orthotic Insole wicks away moisture, inhibits odour and fungus and ensures air flow to keep your feet cool adiPRENE® in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency Outsole FORMOTION technology on the outsole adapts to the ground to ensure the smoothest, most comfortable run possible adiPRENE® under the heel with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning on impact Combination of blown rubber and sticky rubber for exceptional grip in high-impact areas Updated Torsion System TPU for a smooth midfoot transition with increased midfoot integrity Flex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feet miCoach Compatible shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
